name: tedo0626--gemini-sub-agent
description: Use Google Gemini as a free sub-agent via a Google One / Gemini Advanced subscription (no API key or API credits needed). Use when: (1) delegating tasks that would normally cost Sonnet/Haiku credits, (2) processing large documents or long-context tasks (1M token window), (3) running agentic coding tasks autonomously, (4) any text analysis, summarization, or Q&A task. Replaces paid cloud models for medium-complexity tasks. NOT for: tasks needing OpenClaw-native tools (web_search, sessions_spawn, Telegram), real-time data, or tasks requiring OpenClaw context.
